title: Today, I signed a decree establishing a new special day – the Day of...

description: Today, I signed a decree establishing a new special day – the Day of the Unmanned Systems Forces. From now on, it will be observed every year on June 11. A day of our respect and gratitude to the USF. For the first time in the world, such a branch of the military was created – in Ukraine. We are developing the USF to the max, and it is Ukrainians who have proved that through technology,...

title: Missile attack
description: Do you know the most interesting thing in the photo of the aftermath of the attack on the defense plant "VNIIR-Progress" in Cheboksary? This is because anti-drone nets were stretched there, which, however, could not save the building from being "pierced" by the Ukrainian Flamingo missile. This shot shows that anti-drone nets are stretched over the destroyed factory building that produces electronics for the Russian Iskanders, and around the enterprise...
description_en: Do you know the most interesting thing in the photo of the aftermath of the attack on the defense plant "VNIIR-Progress" in Cheboksary? This is because anti-drone nets were stretched there, which, however, could not save the building from being "pierced" by the Ukrainian Flamingo missile. This shot shows that anti-drone nets are stretched over the destroyed factory building that produces electronics for the Russian Iskanders, and around the enterprise...
description_uk: Знаете, что самое интересное на фото последствий удара по оборонному заводу "ВНИИР-Прогресс"в Чебоксарах? Это то, что там были натянуты антидроновые сети, которые однако, не смогли спасти здания от «пробития» украинской ракетой «Фламинго». На этом кадре видно, что над разрушенным зданием завода, производящим электронику для российских «Искандеров», натянуты антидроновые сети а вокруг предприятия...

title: Explosions reported
description: Ukraine approves NEO-1 bomb disposal robot capable of detecting mines and grenades The NEO-1, a robotic hardware and software system for remote detection of explosive devices, has been officially approved for service in Ukraine's defence forces. Read the full article on our website

title: Moscow is still protected by a missile defense system with nuclear...
title_en: Moscow is still protected by a missile defense system with nuclear...
title_uk: Москву досі захищає система ПРО з ядерним...
description: Moscow is still protected by a missile defense system with nuclear warheads, — Defense Express The capital of the Russian Federation remains the only region covered by a full-fledged A-135 "Amur" strategic missile defense system since the time of the USSR. It was created for decades with one goal — to protect Moscow and the top leadership of the country in the event of a nuclear war. The most unusual thing in this system is anti-missile missiles with nuclear warheads....
description_en: Moscow is still protected by a missile defense system with nuclear warheads, — Defense Express The capital of the Russian Federation remains the only region covered by a full-fledged A-135 "Amur" strategic missile defense system since the time of the USSR. It was created for decades with one goal — to protect Moscow and the top leadership of the country in the event of a nuclear war. The most unusual thing in this system is anti-missile missiles with nuclear warheads....
description_uk: москву до сих пор защищает система ПРО с ядерными боеголовками, — Defense Express Столица рф остается единственным регионом, который еще со времен СССР прикрывает полноценная система стратегической ПРО А-135 «Амур». Ее создавали десятилетиями с одной целью — защитить москву и высшее руководство страны в случае ядерной войны. Самое необычное в этой системе — противоракеты с ядерными боеголовками....

title: Mariupol: Power outage reported
description: Russian-occupied Mariupol port no longer operational after Ukrainian strikes, Azov says. As a result of the attack, the port was left without power, significantly disrupting Russian military logistics in occupied southern Ukraine, the Azov Corps said.
description_en: Russian-occupied Mariupol port no longer operational after Ukrainian strikes, Azov says. As a result of the attack, the port was left without power, significantly disrupting Russian military logistics in occupied southern Ukraine, the Azov Corps said.

title: Kherson: Attack attack
description: Update: Chonhar Bridge connecting occupied Kherson Oblast and Crimea destroyed, official says. Andrii Kovalenko, head of Ukraine’s Center for Countering Disinformation, reported on June 10 that the strategic bridge was destroyed following a June 9 strike. Satellite imagery published by Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty’s “Schemes” project also confirmed damage from a previous attack on June 7,...

title: Kharkiv: 207 drones intercepted
description: 6 killed, 60 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day as Kharkiv targeted for 2nd day in a row. The Air Force said Russia launched 207 drones, 181 of which were intercepted. At least 21 drones struck 14 locations, while falling debris was recorded at 13 sites.
description_en: 6 killed, 60 injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine over past day as Kharkiv targeted for 2nd day in a row. The Air Force said Russia launched 207 drones, 181 of which were intercepted. At least 21 drones struck 14 locations, while falling debris was recorded at 13 sites.

title: Energy infrastructure hit
description: The results of damage to the Hrushovaya oil depot, the Krasnoarmeysk NPS and the Krasny Yar LVDS have been confirmed. According to the results of preliminary reconnaissance of the affected fuel and energy infrastructure facilities of the Russian Federation on June 8, 2026, additional damage results have been confirmed. ⚡️Fire has been confirmed at the "Grushovaya" transshipment oil depot in the area of ​​the Hrushova Balka settlement of the Krasnodar Territory of the Russian Federation...
description_en: The results of damage to the Hrushovaya oil depot, the Krasnoarmeysk NPS and the Krasny Yar LVDS have been confirmed. description_uk: Уточнено результати ураження нафтобази "Грушовая", НПС "Красноармейск" та ЛВДС "Красний Яр" За результатами дорозвідки уражених 8 червня 2026 року об'єктів паливно-енергетичної інфраструктури російської федерації підтверджено додаткові результати ураження. ⚡️На перевалочній нафтобазі "Грушовая" в районі населеного пункту Грушова Балка Краснодарського краю російської федерації підтверджено горіння...

title: Drone strike
description: We continue to apply Ukrainian long-range sanctions against Russian military facilities and the oil industry. In particular, this night Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingos hit a military factory in Cheboksary, which supplies the occupying army with components for drones and missiles. Thank you ZSU for the accuracy! The Kuibyshevsky oil refinery in the Samara region was also hit last night. The distance from the front line is...
description_en: We continue to apply Ukrainian long-range sanctions against Russian military facilities and the oil industry. In particular, this night Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingos hit a military factory in Cheboksary, which supplies the occupying army with components for drones and missiles. Thank you ZSU for the accuracy! The Kuibyshevsky oil refinery in the Samara region was also hit last night. The distance from the front line is...
description_uk: Продовжуємо застосовувати українські далекобійні санкції проти російських воєнних об’єктів і нафтової галузі. Зокрема, цієї ночі українські FP-5 Flamingo влучили у воєнний завод у Чебоксарах, який забезпечує армію окупанта компонентами для дронів і ракет. Дякую ЗСУ за влучність! Уражено також за минулу ніч нафтопереробний завод «Куйбишевський» у Самарському регіоні. Відстань від лінії фронту –...

title: Kyiv: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Ukraine's race to winter: a 5.4-billion-euro plan, and a problem paying for it As Russian drones and missiles continue to pound Ukraine's war-damaged energy infrastructure, Kyiv is struggling to find funding for a 5.4 billion euro ($6.2 billion) "energy resilience plan" first announced in spring. While financing talks are ongoing with international partners, including the EU, Ukraine’s government...
